item.title: Nailed it!
item.description:
Source: https://bsky.app/profile/katelynburns.com/post/3lqfgldsmu225 Normally I would just like/heart and scroll by this type of image. But I’m making this my phone wallpaper, it’s fucking dope!!!
Remember kids, pride started as a riot https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stonewall_riots?wprov=sfti1 Someone somewhere wishes they didn’t exist because of who they are or who they love. Pride month is to remind them that they still belong, and they are loved. Fuck being an ally, be an accomplice in the LGBTQ agenda.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Relaxing on the bottom shelf.
item.description:
Unmute for marbles
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
And also, get REKT. ┌∩┐(ಠ_ಠ)┌∩┐
You can catch deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka

item.title: Wall Street named him TACO
item.description: It’s a tongue-in-cheek term that stands for "Trump Always Chickens Out” in regard to tariffs. There has been a pattern of stocks plunging when the Trump administration announces stiff new tariffs.

item.title: What Happened Today #119
item.description: ? The incompetence is turning more dangerous. Trump will rally tomorrow to celebrate the exact steel deal he campaigned against, while calling the Federalist Society leader who picked his judges a "sleazebag" because they ruled against him. Now the GOP gets whoever Trump says as judges and there will be no outside review allowed. Meanwhile, his deportation promises have failed so badly they've had three ICE leadership shakeups in five months and created an "Office of Remigration" straight from the European white nationalism playbook. When authoritarians can't deliver, they don't moderate - they escalate. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Subscribe free at the website or on Substack. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-deal-enrichment 2. https://go.govbrief.today/tariffs-appeal-continue 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-meet 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-nippon-steel-rally 5. https://go.govbrief.today/maha-report-ai 6. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-foreign-student-tro 7. https://go.govbrief.today/supreme-court-nepa 8. https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-testing-office 9. https://go.govbrief.today/ingrassia-special-counsel 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-blasts-federalist-society 11. https://go.govbrief.today/aba-judicial-nominees 12. https://go.govbrief.today/susie-wiles-impersonator 13. https://go.govbrief.today/third-ice-shakeup 14. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-ag-contempt 15. https://go.govbrief.today/state-dept-remigration 16. https://go.govbrief.today/asl-interpreters-briefings 17. https://go.govbrief.today/60minutes-mental-anguish 18. https://go.govbrief.today/mine-safety-offices Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/taco-trade-tariffs Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/raskin-probes-crypto-dinner
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1376 (mug check)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Woke up in an oddly good mood.
My assumption is that it's because I haven't looked at the news yet and that nothing bad has happened yet to me or any of my closest friends. Also, no nightmares.
Well, okay, I think the Mulberry mead I was trying to make has stalled, but whatever.
Oh. Ooooh. It could be the mainia state of my bipolar why I'm in a better mood this AM. Ah, damn it.
Me, right now, I guess.
Secured a car rental for the interview today. But I couldn't do laundry because the key to the laundry room is on the keychain at the mechanic shop. And I'm out of deodorant. And I found candlewax on my suit, because last wore it on Pascha.... okay. Good mood gone. Terror ensuing. This feels more normal.
I guess maybe a blue suit might be overkill anyway. Hell, I don't know these things.
I have so many pictures of birds being held like cigarettes because, as a teen, I helped volunteer at a bird banding research program. I never thought of them being held like cigarettes until I saw this meme, so we're looking at a lag time of a minimum of 20 years here. I really miss doing that. It was wild to be holding this tiny dapper male Wilson's Warbler with a jet black toupee (and those feathers had an entirely different texture than any other feathers on his body) that weighed about the same as a full envelope of junk mail, knowing that this chap had just arrived from Chiapas in Mexico and was on his way to British Columbia for like the third time. It really put things into perspective. Also, they had whiskers, and it was cute.
I also, thinking on that, am reminded of a series of paintings I wanted to do of the up close eyes of songbirds. Never did more than one painting in that series. I wanted to do it to try and understand mystical how they were able to do what they do, navigating by the stars and the waves of Earth's magnetic field, ya know? I know they'd never sell, but it would be cool.
So, this may be a controversial opinion, but I feel like Frasier has held up, from a feminism perspective more than Futurama. It genuinely felt less problematic, and I cringed a lot less. I had this thought last week when I was suffering from food poisoning and basically didn't even have the strength to do more than watch TV.
So, the Sargasso sea?
It won't work.
I kinda want a giant lab-grown star sapphire the size of a baby's fist. Maybe stick it on a staff for wizard shit. But I've not seen any that large for sale. Does anyone know if lab-grown blue star sapphires that big exist? Not that I can afford one right now, but for the future.
Thankfully, not many ticks in Arizona, but the chiggers still aren't fun.
@kaeldra
Yeap.
Eventually, the Dragonborn is gonna die, though.
Both simultaneously at times.
Not a meme, just a cool history infographic.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "squeak" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: JebidiahBeetus

item.title: Yasss
item.description: I got a psych eval in 2020. I requested an autism eval, as well. I have a strong family history of ASD. It was speculated when I was going into kindergarten I might be autistic. In the 90s it would be Asperger's in my case. But I was too social. 2020 results says: raad score 165! Definitive diagnosis! Right? ... Right? Nope. Because, again, I am too social. My in person presentation doesn't match my raad score typical presentation. "Typically, if someone has a score that high they're profoundly autistic." Be raised by a narcissist and grow up around toxic family and school settings, tell me you don't learn how to mask. I frequently say I deserve an EGOT for my daily performances. Anyway, despite the psychologist saying I don't have it, I've been exploring what unmasking might look like. Today, something really cool happened at work. I got really excited and called attention to it. Another coworker laughed, but it wasn't a kind laugh. It was the "omg, you're so cringe" laugh. Felt the rejection sensitivity of my ADHD hit. Felt the cptsd knee jerk. Felt the ASD shame for existing. Caught that, threw it out, and focused on the cool thing. Continued to express myself in spite of their reaction. And it felt good! I haven't been in a spiral since! I was authentic and cringe and weird and I'm alive and ok, and I got to experience something really cool! Fuck you, haters. The mask is coming off.
item.dc:creator: Wrongclusterbdisorderbutgooff

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Donald, could you help me out with some diapers...
item.description: "Mr. Musk’s drug consumption went well beyond occasional use," the Times reported. "He told people he was taking so much ketamine, a powerful anesthetic, that it was affecting his bladder, a known effect of chronic use. He took Ecstasy and psychedelic mushrooms. And he traveled with a daily medication box that held about 20 pills, including ones with the markings of the stimulant Adderall, according to a photo of the box and people who have seen it." Sauce: https://www.rawstory.com/elon-musk-use-bladder/
item.dc:creator: Che07

item.title: They found her!
item.description: Valerie was separated from her family during a camping trip and survived on a remote Australian island for 529 days before being rescued. https://www.npr.org/2025/05/30/nx-s1-5403639/valerie-mini-dachshund-australia-found
item.dc:creator: bourbonandbaddecisions

item.title: The signature progression of an Alzheimer's patient.
item.description: The perfect representation of a condition that makes you lose everything that makes you yourself.
